The SPARQL query retrieves actresses who won the Academy Award for Best Actress (Q103618) and were unmarried at the time of their award. It checks for the absence of active marriages (using spouse statements qualified with start/end times) overlapping with the award date. Example results would include actresses like Jennifer Lawrence (won 2013, unmarried at the time) and Halle Berry (excluded as she was married in 2002). Final results depend on Wikidata content.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?actress ?actressLabel ?date WHERE {
  ?actress p:P166 ?awardStatement .
  ?awardStatement ps:P166 wd:Q103618 ; pq:P585 ?date .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?actress rdfs:label ?actressLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?actressLabel) = 'en')
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?actress p:P26 ?marriageStatement .
    ?marriageStatement pq:P580 ?start .
    OPTIONAL {
      ?marriageStatement pq:P582 ?end .
    }
    FILTER(?date >= ?start &&(! BOUND(?end) || ?date <= ?end))
  }
  FILTER(BOUND(?date))
}
ORDER BY ?date
```
